alt_translation1: ल, यो हाम्रो लुगाहरू यहीं झुण्ड्याअौं ।

Translated_Text: She moves her feet here and there.
Now don't bother him!
They also used your grandfather's stuff.
We also use eggs, pullets, and piglets (in our rituals).
alt_translation1: कुखुराको अण्डा, चल्ला, सुँगुरको पाठा पनि (पूजामा) प्रयोग गर्छौं ।

Primary_Text: Aseĩ apakku hokkoiʔ yage lo ni?
Translated_Text: Where did my uncle spend the night last time?
alt_translation1: अस्ति मेरो काका कहाँ बास बस्नुभयो ?

Primary_Text: Akko deha bolliyo yakno racha them!
Translated_Text: My body is strong, huh!
alt_translation1: यो मेरो देहा बलियो रहेछ के ।

Translated_Text: I've got a stinging ache in my hip.
I also had rice beer.
It's even bigger than you.
He tickles us.
It's tickling me. / I feel like laughing.
Our village is a place where oranges grow well, too. (literally “Our village is a place which is also suitable for oranges.”)
Is this rope okay?
We're worthless. (literally “We're not good for anything.”)
I make millet porridge for her, don't I.
She isn't afraid at all.
The pot gets damaged, don't mess with it.
Let me see... this one is sharp.
The stone is not sharp enough to make a hole in the ground.
They have made them very thin.

Primary_Text: Tori yɨnokko goru na naŋ andha lo ni.
Translated_Text: The ox grinding the mustard is blind.
alt_translation1: तोरी पेल्ने गोरु त अन्धो छ नि ।

Translated_Text: He copied him.
Look how she's shivering up there!
Use the fragrant soap, please.
The man applied the medicine on his nose with his hand.
alt_translation1: मान्छेले औषधी हातले उसको कानमा लगायो ।

Primary_Text: Aphok lhɨkte, ek china yomsuŋ gonei.
Translated_Text: My belly is full, I need to give it a rest for a moment.
alt_translation1: पेट गह्रौं भयो, एक छिन आराम गराउँछु ल ।

Translated_Text: Mother sifted the millet.

Primary_Text: Maʔmi sie kina anaŋa yum cama yoŋsukumma.
Translated_Text: When someone has died we don't eat salt.

Primary_Text: Khai yopma kina utemlamma riʔma konno.
Translated_Text: The yeast has to be crumbled and added from above.
alt_translation1: मर्च धुलो पारेर माथिबाट छर्कनु पर्छ ।

Primary_Text: Ded mana nayoʔnabi kina aco garda ukusmukus ali ni!
Translated_Text: If he gives you one and a half mana more and you eat it you'll get sick!
alt_translation1: डेढ माना थपिदिएर खायौ भने उकुस-मुकुस हुन्छ नि ।

Translated_Text: The creepers were flat and round.

Primary_Text: Salo kha naŋ, huĩ luŋtakbe yuwaktago?
Translated_Text: Who is it who was sitting on that stone?
The man has sat down on the floor.
The man was sitting on the floor.
Sit down on a stool.
So she lives with her elder sister?
The child lived in the village.
It's only got three children. (“There are only three of its children.”)
We had kept some vegetables for her in a bowl.
Put this bowl over there.
Why did you bring up the rope? Put it back!
The man put the book on the table.
the pot where the soybeans have been put
The man has loaded hay onto the truck.

Primary_Text: Hani lo moʔŋa tandi ayuiŋsihẽ mahaʔ.
Translated_Text: You were on the lower floor, weren't you.
alt_translation1: तिमीहरू तल्लो तलामा बसेका थियौ, होइन ।

Primary_Text: Yoʔŋa tara Jethiʔko ra bhaiʔŋa tara Kanchiʔko.
Translated_Text: The yonder plain is Jethi's, and the one here is Kanchi's.
alt_translation1: पल्लो टार जेठीको र यहाँको टार कान्छीको ।
